nodes.title: 展示文本
widgets_values: A solid uniform gray square image filling the entire frame with no visible subjects, objects, text, patterns, gradients, or edges, pure medium gray color tone RGB approximately 128,128,128, completely flat matte surface without any light highlights, shadows, textures, reflections, or depth, seamless solid fill across all pixels, sharp pixel-perfect edges on all four sides forming a perfect square aspect ratio, no noise, no grain, no artifacts, no watermarks, photorealistic digital render of absolute color uniformity, high-resolution crisp focus on the even color distribution, professional studio-captured solid color field with maximum clarity and detail fidelity in every pixel, Canon EOS 5D Mark IV shot at 50mm f/8 ISO 100 for precise flat color accuracy.
一位成年亚洲女性，精致自然的五官，长发微卷，身穿黑色丝绸旗袍与金色刺绣，端庄坐在木质方凳上，手持红色折扇。暖橙色电影光影，柔和雾气背景，皮肤质感自然，构图完整，时尚杂志人像摄影，细节清晰，高级感。
